comic.title: The Digital Noise
comic.desc: Overwhelmed by infinite feeds, constant pings, and chaotic notifications of the modern day.

comic.title: The Conscious Pause
comic.desc: Unplugging, closing your eyes, and taking a single deep breath to reclaim your quiet space.

comic.title: The Quiet Path
comic.desc: Walking with light steps on a serene, sunlit path, guided by nature and absolute simplicity.

comic.title: The Homecoming
comic.desc: Finding your tribe, meditating under a clear sky, and coming back home to yourself.

experiences.title: Workshop
experiences.tagline: Decoding Jain concepts to align with your natural, effortless state.
experiences.body: An educational session that translates Jain principles — non-violence, non-possessiveness, many-sided understanding — into the texture of an ordinary, modern life. Beyond sects. Beyond rituals. Just lived.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Workshop - Translating deep Jain values to modern life

experiences.title: Activities
experiences.body: Creative games, quizzes, self-reflective exercises, and conversations that turn philosophy into experience. You don't learn Sahajta. You bump into it.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Activities - Playful learning and game simulation

experiences.title: Poetry
experiences.tagline: Words that hold you when the world won't.
experiences.body: Modern poems written in a voice your generation actually speaks. Verses that meet you in the chaos and walk you back to stillness.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Poetry - Soul-stirring poetry reading session

experiences.title: Meditation
experiences.body: A quiet contemplation of the pure, enlightened self — the Siddha within. Not a technique to master. A homecoming to remember.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Meditation - Guided pure soul contemplation and mindfulness

experiences.title: Panel Discussion
experiences.tagline: Real talk. Real life. Real Sahaj.
experiences.body: Unscripted conversations with achievers who carry Sahaj values into worlds of ambition, pressure, and noise. Less interview, more confession.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Panel - Direct unscripted conversation with leaders and influencers

experiences.title: Nukkad Natak
experiences.tagline: Theatre that takes the stage to the street.
experiences.body: A high-energy street play scored by thunderous Nashik dhol — the values of peace, simplicity, and non-violence delivered with the volume they deserve.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Nukkad Natak - High energy theatrical street play with live drums

experiences.title: Keertan
experiences.body: A live musical jamming session — soulful voices, modern instruments, lyrics that carry the weight of Jain wisdom into rhythm you can feel in your chest.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Keertan - Unplugged soul and acoustic wisdom session

experiences.title: Specialised Jain Food
experiences.body: Exotic, contemporary dishes from across the world — every one prepared in complete accordance with the Jain food system. Premium. Conscious. Delicious.
experiences.alt: Specialised Jain Food - Vegetarian culinary fine dining experience

experiences.title: Sahaj Haat
experiences.tagline: An open-air experiential space at Chidayatan where culture, conversations, food, creativity, and conscious living come together.
experiences.body: Designed with the charm of a traditional mela, Sahaj Haat will feature curated food stalls, engaging activities, sponsored experiences, and interactive spaces that allow youngsters to explore the spirit of Sahaj in a lively and memorable way.
experiences.alt: Sahaj Haat - An open-air experiential traditional mela space

thought.quote: “Your calm mind is the ultimate weapon against your challenges. So, relax.”
thought.author: Bryant McGill
thought.tip: Take a deep inhalation of ease, hold for three seconds, and let it go.

word.meaning: The state of being in constant, unforced flow with existence. Acting from your true nature, completely free of anxiety, pretense, or struggle.

challenge.title: Digital Detox Hour
challenge.desc: Disconnect from all screens (phone, laptop, television) for exactly 1 hour after sunset today. Spend that time walking, writing, or sitting in absolute quiet.
